last_item: Band D (RolesDatabases): RolesDatabases → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/RolesDatabases.tsx. All .btn* → Button (primary CTA=default; card/table actions=outline size=sm; Delete=destructive size=sm; modal Cancel=outline); rotate + modal-submit busy states compose the raw Spinner (@/components/ui/spinner) via data-icon='inline-start'. Both .data-table → Table family (Table/TableHeader/TableBody/TableRow/TableHead/TableCell); .table-scroll dropped (Table self-scrolls); .col-actions → text-right + a 'flex justify-end gap-2' row for the two-button roles cell. Forms → Field+FieldLabel+FieldDescription+FieldError+Input; the two native <select>s → shadcn Select (Trigger/Value/Content/Item), disabled when option set empty. NameField rebuilt on Field/Input; a11y: data-invalid on Field, aria-invalid + aria-describedby (help id, plus FieldError id when invalid) on Input; Select triggers describe their FieldDescription hint. bullet-list/muted/secrets-list markup → Tailwind tokens. Behavior identical: same Modal create flows, same TypedConfirmDialog typed-name drop confirm, same rotate/one-time-secrets reveal, same toasts. Shared Card/PageHeader/EmptyState/Spinner/ErrorNotice/SecretValue/Callout kept (migrated separately). Deleted dead .bullet-list/.field-error/.secrets-list CSS (RolesDatabases-only; .secret-*/.field-help kept — shared). Added RolesDatabases.test.tsx (5 tests).
last_result: green: typecheck, 106 web tests (+5), build, go build (outside sandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). ui-heuristics-reviewer: ACCEPTED all 3 a11y findings on my own markup — (1) FieldError now has an id wired into the Input's aria-describedby when invalid; (2) both Select triggers aria-describedby their FieldDescription hint; (3) table Delete buttons disabled while a drop is in flight (defense-in-depth — the open AlertDialog overlay already blocks the table, and the original didn't disable them either, so visibly behavior-identical). Next in band D: Query. Still deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft; prune next-themes dep.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
